title: Playoff ingress overflow at Gate B
summary: Queue spillback was reduced after overflow lanes were opened and staffing was shifted.
resolution: Resolved in 11 minutes after crowd-flow reassignment.

title: Elevator 4 door sensor fault
summary: Elevator outage impacted accessible routing on the concourse.
resolution: Mitigated with alternate route staffing while engineering reset the lift.

title: Wheelchair escort request near Section 112
summary: Guest services completed a wheelchair handoff and escorted the guest to seating.
